description_long: This is a low-top sneaker with a predominantly mauve or dark pink suede upper, accented by a distinctive white side stripe and white stitching. The shoe features a white rubber midsole with a brown gum outsole, which displays a classic waffle tread pattern. The lacing system consists of white eyelets and white laces, arranged in a standard criss-cross style. The interior appears to be lined with a light-colored fabric, and the heel and toe areas are reinforced for durability. The overall design is sporty and casual, suitable for urban environments and everyday wear.
description: A mauve suede low-top sneaker with a white side stripe, white laces, and a brown gum waffle sole. The shoe is sporty, casual, and well-suited for urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the mauve suede upper, white side stripe, and white midsole.
description_view_1: Bottom view highlighting the brown gum sole with a waffle tread pattern.
description_view_2: Angled top view displaying the lacing system, tongue, and inner lining.
description_view_3: Top-down view focusing on the laces, tongue, and opening of the shoe.
